name: Groq Whisper Transcription
author: QUILL Team
description: Adds Groq's fast Whisper large-v3-turbo as a cloud transcription provider. Audio is uploaded to Groq only when you explicitly transcribe with this provider and have configured an API key -- never offline, never without consent. The QUILL host performs the upload under the network-egress audit; the extension itself handles no audio bytes or keys.

transcription_providers.description: Cloud speech-to-text via Groq's whisper-large-v3-turbo. Very fast and high accuracy; requires a Groq API key and per-use consent.
